<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Factories; use PhpParser\NodeTraverser; use PhpParser\NodeVisitor\NameResolver; use PhpParser\NodeVisitor\ParentConnectingVisitor; class NodeTraverserFactory { public static function create(): NodeTraverser { $traverser = new NodeTraverser; $traverser->addVisitor(new NameResolver(null, ['replaceNodes' => false])); $traverser->addVisitor(new ParentConnectingVisitor); return $traverser; } }
